prs.title: SM-406, SM-466, SM-459, improves agent, assessment ui
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Spans 21 files across AI agent logic, schema migrations, field definitions, multiple actions/hooks, and UI components — a major multi-ticket feature touching the full stack from DB to UI.

prs.title: SM 427: improves competitive analysis, studio
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Meaningful improvements across competitive analysis agent/prompt and Studio editor components (toolbar, comments, editor, streaming routes) representing a significant cross-cutting feature enhancement.

prs.title: Fix assessment page scroll, slide positioning, and remove deploy script
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small collection of CSS/layout scroll and positioning fixes plus removal of a deploy script — minor bug fixes across a handful of files with low custom line count.

prs.title: Fix assessment page scroll and slide positioning
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Nearly identical to PR #330 without the deploy script removal — small CSS/layout scroll and positioning fixes across four files.

prs.title: Switch secrets from staging to production
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-file config change swapping environment secrets from staging to production — trivial operational tweak.

prs.title: Enhance product management, chat integration, and UI improvements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 167 changed files and 5291 custom lines spanning the entire AI agent architecture, context refactoring, product-scoped chat, UI improvements, and numerous sub-systems — a transformative, multi-week epic.

prs.title: Add ISVA auto-match flag to Playbooks
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds a new ISVA auto-match flag across schema, migration, seed, admin UI, and playbook suggestion logic — a solid self-contained feature touching data layer through to admin tooling.

prs.title: SM-454: Target industries multi-select, strategy chat motion, scroll fixes
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Introduces target industries multi-select with schema migration, field collector updates, multiple UI components, chat motion/scroll fixes, and chat visibility logic — a significant cross-cutting feature.

stories.name: AI Agent & Assessment Experience Improvements
stories.rationale: Improved the AI agent behavior, assessment UI, and competitive analysis features within the Studio to deliver a more polished and capable AI-driven experience.

stories.name: Assessment Page Layout & Scroll Fixes
stories.rationale: Resolved scroll and slide positioning issues on the assessment page across two iterative fixes to ensure a smooth user experience.

stories.name: Production Environment Secrets Migration
stories.rationale: Switched application secrets from staging to production configuration to support a live production deployment.

stories.name: Product Management & Chat Integration Enhancements
stories.rationale: Enhanced core product management capabilities, integrated strategy chat with motion improvements, added multi-select for target industries, and addressed various UI and scroll issues across the platform.

stories.name: ISVA Auto-Match for Playbooks
stories.rationale: Added an ISVA auto-match flag to Playbooks, enabling automated matching logic to streamline playbook administration workflows.
